{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323155533A1CECF311073009F3884"}"},"total":1002},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7202588147329385249","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"主角陈无道一路无敌到主宰境，人挡杀人，魔挡杀魔，神挡杀神。签到系统太给力，每当大敌降临前系统给的奖力都足以斩杀强敌。就连家庭及宇宙都跟着成長为最强宇宙。文章生动，完全无敌文，就是结尾团集時没有了后文有些可惜，主角都顶峰了又想更上层去发展。太牛逼了。一人得道鸡犬升天。","text_exts":[{"e":33,"s":29,"text":"签到系统","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%AD%BE%E5%88%B0%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774252533009F3884%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227202588147329385249%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227063425237936770078%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%AD%BE%E5%88%B0%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1676983323,"group_id":"7063425237936770078","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"先天完美无瑕混沌神魔霸体","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+4ih3RLkx+XqZ5AgsO4NO0=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"100293249763","user_name":"用户10029324"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"100293249763","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1800295541,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7063425237936770078","book_info":{"abstract":"pa:主角全程无敌！战力爆表！
隔壁君家出了位荒古圣体，叶家出了位九窍玲珑剑心。
当陈家龙凤胎降世后，惊动老祖，老祖的棺材板都压不住了。
九天十地都被震动。
更引起禁区古皇出手扼杀，遭到陈家老祖镇压。
在这大争之世，陈无道以恐怖禁体一路横推，震古烁今。
陈无道：任你万般圣体，什么帝尊转世，活佛转世，在我天谴禁体面前都要颤栗。
人族无大帝，那我陈无道便成帝，打穿七大禁区，横推一切敌。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/58e03c4a595eb43057f3de42189cb474","author":"小白欧力给","author_id":"","book_id":"7063425237936770078","book_name":"我异象太多，老祖棺材板压不住了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7145人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7064113562750288424","read_count":"7145","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1551792"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"728","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,无敌,架空,东方玄幻,无脑爽,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4b0688f6be39f0ac6f46ba39b7222e8f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779436533&x-signature=GznZn%2BogIioHVU7rHL1Ak7CE4E8%3D","tomato_book_status"
